events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes Around Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The United States and Iran have engaged in reciprocal strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with both nations claiming control over the strategic waterway. This escalation follows previous attacks on shipping, signaling a heightened state of conflict in the region.

events.title: US Imposes Maritime Blockade on Iran
events.desc: The U.S. military announced it would begin enforcing a comprehensive maritime blockade on Iran, effective July 14. The blockade is set to cover all Iranian ports, oil terminals, and coastal areas, impacting all vessel traffic regardless of flag.

events.title: Trump Notifies Congress of Resumed Hostilities with Iran
events.desc: President Donald Trump formally notified Congress on July 10 that hostilities against Iran resumed on July 7. This notification opens a new 60-day window for military action in the region without prior congressional approval, citing the need to protect American interests.

events.title: US Attacking Iran's Strait of Hormuz Capabilities
events.desc: President Trump stated that the U.S. is targeting Iran's capabilities related to the Strait of Hormuz amid renewed military actions. The U.S. military confirmed launching fresh strikes against Iran, though Trump indicated that a negotiated settlement remains a possibility.

events.title: US to Strike Iran's Pickaxe Mountain Nuclear Site
events.desc: President Trump announced the U.S. intention to strike Iran's 'Pickaxe Mountain,' identified as an underground nuclear facility where recent construction has been detected. This statement signals a potential new phase in the conflict, targeting Iran's nuclear infrastructure.

events.title: UK Bans Support for IRGC
events.desc: The UK has officially banned support for Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) under new powers. The group has been linked to death threats and intimidation on British soil, leading to this significant diplomatic and security measure.

events.title: US and Iran Trade Fire as Khamenei is Buried
events.desc: The U.S. military's CENTCOM reported hitting 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, coinciding with the burial of Iran's late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei. The Iranian health ministry reported 14 deaths since Tuesday, indicating significant casualties from the ongoing conflict.

events.title: US Strikes Target Iranian Capabilities in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The United States has launched strikes aimed at Iran's capabilities associated with the Strait of Hormuz. This action is part of the ongoing military engagement between the two nations, which has seen significant exchanges of fire in the strategic waterway.

events.title: Iran Claims Attacks on US Assets in Regional Allies
events.desc: Following U.S. strikes, Iran claimed to have attacked U.S. military assets in Kuwait, Jordan, Bahrain, and Oman. This broadens the conflict's scope, drawing regional U.S. allies into the direct exchanges of fire.

events.title: US Strikes Hit 90 Iranian Targets as Fighting Continues
events.desc: CENTCOM reported striking 90 Iranian targets in the latest offensive. This signifies a continued and intense kinetic exchange between the U.S. and Iran, occurring amidst heightened geopolitical tensions and the recent burial of Iran's Supreme Leader.

events.title: Three Palestinians Killed in Gaza
events.desc: Israeli forces conducted attacks across Gaza, resulting in the deaths of three Palestinians and injuries to fifteen others. This incident underscores the ongoing conflict and humanitarian crisis in the region, despite reports of a ceasefire.

events.title: Iranian Engineer Convicted of Exporting Technology for Military Drones
events.desc: An Iranian-born engineer has been convicted in the U.S. for conspiring to illegally export technology potentially usable in military drones to an Iranian company linked to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. This case highlights ongoing efforts to prevent sensitive technology from reaching entities involved in military development.

events.title: Trump Threatens to Strike 'Pickaxe Mountain' Nuclear Site
events.desc: President Trump has threatened to strike Iran's 'Pickaxe Mountain,' identified as an underground nuclear facility, citing recent construction detected via satellite imagery. This statement intensifies concerns over Iran's nuclear program and the potential for direct military action against its nuclear infrastructure.

events.title: UAE Condemns Iranian Tanker Attack Amid Fresh US Strikes
events.desc: The United Arab Emirates has condemned what it called a 'brazen' Iranian attack on tankers. This statement comes as the US continues its strikes against Iran, with President Trump announcing a new blockade and charges for passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US and Iran Trade Strikes After Tanker Incidents
events.desc: The US military reported striking missile sites and command centers within Iran, while Iran claimed attacks on US bases in retaliation for incidents involving tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. This exchange marks a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict.
